  • GDEF entries for generated .color glyphs: https://github.com/googlefonts/fontc/issues/1870
  • glyph order for colr glyphs: https://github.com/googlefonts/fontc/issues/1861
  • (to add or change, manually edit annotations.json)

Default content
close [x]
